description: Rules the AI planner uses to decide which stations a production line needs. Deterministic; no Blender.

loading_station.name: Loading Station
loading_station.purpose: Receive and kit incoming components onto trays for the line.
loading_station.info_panel_text: Loading: incoming components are kitted and released onto the line.

assisted_assembly_station.name: Assisted Assembly Station
assisted_assembly_station.purpose: Manual assembly of the product with guided tooling.
assisted_assembly_station.info_panel_text: Assisted Assembly: operators build the unit with guidance and torque-controlled tools.

robot_handling_cell.name: Robot Handling Cell
robot_handling_cell.purpose: Automated handling, closure and re-orientation inside a fenced cell.
robot_handling_cell.info_panel_text: Robot Cell: a fenced robot closes and orients the unit for inspection.

vision_inspection_station.name: Vision Inspection Station
vision_inspection_station.purpose: Automated optical inspection of assembly and labeling.
vision_inspection_station.info_panel_text: Vision Inspection: cameras check assembly and labeling; failures are diverted.

functional_test_station.name: Functional Test Station
functional_test_station.purpose: Electrical / functional end-of-line test with per-unit record.
functional_test_station.info_panel_text: Functional Test: each unit is powered and verified; results logged per serial.

packaging_station.name: Packaging Station
packaging_station.purpose: Box, document, label and seal the finished unit.
packaging_station.info_panel_text: Packaging: the unit is boxed, labeled and sealed for shipment.

finished_goods_storage.name: Finished Goods Storage
finished_goods_storage.purpose: Buffer and store finished product for dispatch.
finished_goods_storage.info_panel_text: Finished Goods Storage: cartons accumulate ready for dispatch.
